name: jetty/client
description: Jetty PHP client for the tunnel API (list, delete, share + heartbeats). Publish this tree as the jetty-client repository; require with Composer: jetty/client.

suggest.ext-pcntl: For clean Ctrl+C handling when running `jetty-php share`
suggest.ext-zlib: Required to run the gzipped PHAR build (`composer run build-phar`)
